description_long: This is a vintage-style pickup truck with a rounded cab and a distinctively curved hood, painted in a matte mauve or purple color. The front features a chrome grille, round headlights, and a subtle hood ornament, while the sides display smooth, flowing fenders and black running boards. The truck bed is open with a wooden plank floor, and the rear tailgate has embossed detailing and a triangular reflector. The wheels are modern, with black rims and a multi-spoke design, contrasting with the classic body style. Chrome side mirrors and door handles add to the retro aesthetic, and the windows are slightly tinted. The overall appearance blends classic American truck design with some contemporary elements.
description: A vintage mauve pickup truck with rounded lines, chrome accents, and modern black multi-spoke wheels. The open wooden bed and classic cab evoke a retro American style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the curved hood, chrome grille, round headlights, and a visible license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth fenders, black running board, side mirror, and the open truck bed.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the wooden bed floor, embossed tailgate, triangular reflector, and rear license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the door, fender, running board, and open bed.
attribute_license_plate: Front and rear license plates visible, white with blue text, front plate reads 'LUV 1949'
attribute_wheel_design: Black rims with a multi-spoke design, silver accents, and low-profile tires
